results.name: High-floor apt near Han River, central location
results.description: The Building is a high-end apartment complex popular among expats in Da Nang.Located in the head of the city, near the Han River, it is surrounded by supermarkets, gyms, restaurants, cafés, and more.From the building:	•	A 3-minute walk to the Han River, leading to Han Market, Dragon Bridge, the pedestrian street, and various riverside tourist attractions.	•	A 15-minute drive to My Khe Beach, one of the world’s most beautiful beaches, ideal for sports and recreation.The spaceHigh-Floor Apartment with Stunning City & Han River ViewsPerched on a high floor (~40 meters above ground), this apartment offers breathtaking panoramic views of the city, with its vibrant, illuminated bridges at night.The apartment features two bedrooms with two king-size beds, plus an additional queen-size bed in the living room, comfortably accommodating up to 6 guests. There are two bathrooms, including an en-suite in the master bedroom.The elegantly designed living and dining areas include a plush sofa, smart TV, large refrigerator, and a fully equipped kitchen, making it perfect for a family getaway.Guests have access to the swimming pool on the 5th floor, where the water temperature is regulated, allowing year-round swimming. The pool is managed by a Japanese team, and there is a usage fee of 100,000 VND per adult per use, 50,000 VND per child per use.If you enjoy sports such as tennis, badminton, pickleball, you can rent a court (located about 200 meters from your apartment). If you don’t have a playing partner, you can also hire one. The fees for renting the court and hiring a playing partner are very reasonable.Whether you’re here for leisure or business, this apartment provides a comfortable and unforgettable stay!

results.name: Adorable Apt for couples' getaway_ big pool
results.description: * Free airport pickup for reservations of a week or longer.* It's ideal for business travels or charming couples' retreats.*This is a master room inside a 2-bedroom apartment at the Ocean Suite.  You can enjoy a great view of the entire resort, the ocean, and the pool. Just walk to the swimming pool, restaurant, and beach for a few minutes.Bright, comfortable and quiet apartment in excellent condition.Cleaning service is available during your stay (FREE).The space# Fully Furnished Apartment ## Cozy SpaceThe bedroom is thoughtfully furnished with comfortable king-size beds, fresh linens, and comfy space to ensure a restful night’s sleep.Convenience Bathrooms: Enjoy a well-appointed bathroom, equipped with a shower, sinks, fresh towels, and complimentary toiletries.Bright Living Area: Unwind in the spacious living room with access to the balcony, a plush sofa, a flat-screen TV, and plenty of natural light. Situated in Da Nang, 300 metres from My Khe Beach and less than 1 km from Bac My An Beach, Mường Thanh Apartment SeaView - Căn Hộ Mường Thanh Đà Nẵng offers a private beach area and air conditioning. This beachfront property offers access to a balcony, free private parking and free WiFi. The accommodation features a 24-hour front desk, a lift and currency exchange for guests.

The apartment has 2 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a terrace with sea views. The accommodation is allergy-free.

There is a coffee shop, and a minimarket is also available. Dining options are available close to the apartment.

Bike hire and car hire are available at Mường Thanh Apartment SeaView - Căn Hộ Mường Thanh Đà Nẵng and the area is popular for hiking and walking tours. A casino and a baby safety gate are available for guests at the accommodation.

Love Lock Bridge Da Nang is 3 km from Mường Thanh Apartment SeaView - Căn Hộ Mường Thanh Đà Nẵng, while Cham Museum is 3.7 km away. results.description: This is a hotel-type accommodation where Korean Air Crews stayed when they came to Da Nang.It is a restaurant with a high-rise corner view where you can see each Han River and My Khe Beach, and the view of downtown Da Nang.It consists of 2 beds, 2 toilets, a living room and a kitchen.Pros* Nice view with corner view of Han River, My Khe Beach & city view* 2bed & 2bathroom (There is a toilet like one in the master room)* 24-hour convenience store is located right in front of the house (Da Nang has almost no 24-hour convenience store)* There is a kitchen for cooking* The neighborhood is quiet * The host resides in the same building, so you can respond quickly (currency exchange, travel information, restaurant information, cheap Grab driver, etc.)* Best Location  -burger bros 1 min walk -Madame Lan 3min walk -3 minutes to Han Market -Bincom Plaza 5 min -Mike Beach 7 min -10 minutes from the airport -OQ pub 3min -goden pine pub 5 minsOther things to noteDue to Vietnamese law, all guests must register for their stay. You'll need to take a photo of the page with your guests' faces on the stamp and passport you received during your stay at the time of entry. results.name: 2BR, Blooming Luxury Sea View Aprt. (145 m2)
results.description: Blooming Tower Danang apartment is located in a central district of the beautiful city of Da Nang, just a few minutes to reach the central area but next to the sea - Da Nang bay meets the Han River and is a place to connect the center of the city to the tourist areas by Thuan Phuoc Suspension Bridge. From this location, the view to the river, sea and Son Tra peninsula is unobstructed. Is a peaceful, spacious place to stay for relaxing with the whole family.From the apartment to Da Nang International Airport is about 4km  and Da Nang Railway Station is about 2.5kmThe spaceThe 2 bedrooms apartment is spacious, airy, with a large balcony that sees Thuan Phuoc suspension bridge across the lower Han River connecting to Son Tra Peninsula.- Suitable for family to rest in a quiet place but close to the city center.- Equipped with fully equipped and luxurious furniture such as: Desk, air conditioner, TV, refrigerator, microwave, rice cooker, water purifier, kettle, kitchen utensils, dishes, bathroom set up towels, shampoo, conditioner, shower oil.- High speed and safe wifi- Free cleaning service 1 time/week for stay more than 14 days.-Great location:  + 5 minutes walking to Han waterfront  + 8 min by taxi to Han market, Pink church  + 15 mins by taxi to the airport.  + 20 mins by taxi to Son Tra peninsula, Linh Ung pagoda.Guest access@ Free access to swimming pool at 3rd floor. @ Table tennis there is a racket rental fee.@ There is small convenient store on the 1st floorOther things to noteBefore booking, please take the time to carefully read our house manual:- In an effort to minimize disposable plastic, we DO NOT provide toothbrushes for you, we do not provide toothbrushes for you So don't forget to bring your toothbrush with you!- We will be very happy if you keep the house green by helping us to water the plants in the morning or afternoon. We would much appreciate it!– Help us save the energy. Turn off the air conditioners and lights, unplug electricity appliances when not in use.– Keep the noise level down after 10pm.– Smoking is not allowed (but you can smoke at the balcony) and pets are not allowed inside our home.– Please daily collect the garbage in the house down to the big garbage can of the building on the outside of the 1st floor.– Unregistered guests are not allowed to stay overnight unless you notice us in advance. We have the right to refuse unregistered guests.– If you accidentally break or damage something, please inform us.– If you have any other questions, please feel free to ask us.Thank you so much!

results.name: Ocean View 1 BRs Luxury Apt with Big Living Room
results.description: Welcome to my modern 1-bedroom, 2-bathroom luxury apartment at Altara Luxury Suite, boasting breathtaking ocean views across 100 sqm.Just steps from My Khe Beach and 3km from downtown, this apartment features a luxurious design, high-quality furnishings, and 24/7 reception and security.Equipped with a modern kitchenette, the apartment ensures a comfortable stay. Conveniently, coffee shops, parks, and a supermarket are nearby.The spaceAltara Apartment provides luxurious accommodation in Da Nang, situated in Son Tra, just steps from My Khe Beach and a 5-minute drive to the city center.Experience the comfort of your fully-equipped apartment, complete with a kitchen stocked with cookware, climate control via air conditioning, and in-unit laundry facilities including a washer and dryer. The apartment also ensures a seamless and secure stay with 24/7 security.This luxurious and charming apartment features:- 60 sqm with ocean view and modern interior- 1 bedroom: Master Room with a King-sized bed, smart TV, and working table- 2 bathrooms: one with a bathtub and shower, and one with a shower, both supplied with shower gel, shampoo, conditioner, and hand wash- Big Living room: equipped with a smart TV and sofa- Kitchen: fully stocked with cooking utensils- Laundry area: includes a washing machine and dryerAdditional Amenities:- 24/7 security- Outdoor Infinity Edge Pool ($8/person/day)- Breakfast not included in the priceGuest accessAt check-in, we will provide you with a security card and apartment key to allow 24/7 access to the condo.Enjoy all the amenities available to you, including 24/7 access to the paid swimming pool and paid gym.For your safety, our common areas are equipped with 24/7 camera surveillance.

results.name: Riverside Vista, high-floor apt, central area
results.description: F-Home Building is a high-end apartment complex popular among expats in Da Nang.Located in the head of the city, near the Han River, it is surrounded by supermarkets, gyms, restaurants, cafés, and more.From the building:	•	A 3-minute walk to the Han River, leading to Han Market, Dragon Bridge, the pedestrian street, and various riverside tourist attractions.	•	A 15-minute drive to My Khe Beach, one of the world’s most beautiful beaches, ideal for sports and recreation.The spaceThe apartment is located on a high floor (~90 meters above ground). From the living room and bedrooms, you can enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of the city, with its vibrant, colorful bridges lighting up at night.The apartment features two bedrooms: one with a king-size bed and another with a queen-size bed, providing a comfortable stay for up to four guests. There are two bathrooms, including an en-suite in the master bedroom.The living and dining areas are elegantly decorated, with an ultra-comfortable sofa. The apartment is also equipped with a smart TV, a large refrigerator, and a fully stocked kitchen—perfect for a family getaway.Guests have access to the swimming pool on the 5th floor, where the water temperature is regulated, allowing year-round swimming. The pool is managed by a Japanese team, and there is a usage fee of 100,000 VND per adult per use, 50,000 VND per child per use.If you enjoy sports such as tennis, badminton, pickleball, you can rent a court (located about 200 meters from your apartment). If you don’t have a playing partner, you can also hire one. The fees for renting the court and hiring a playing partner are very reasonable.Guest accessFrom the apartment, you can enjoy a breathtaking panoramic view of the city from above, as if standing on an observation deck.At sunrise, you can watch the sun slowly rise behind the distant mountain range on the horizon. Here, you can also take in the fresh, crisp air of the riverside city from an altitude of 90 meters above sea level.When night falls, you’ll be enchanted by the dazzling, colorful beauty of the bridges spanning the Han River, the illuminated riverside buildings, and the vibrant boats drifting peacefully along the water.During the annual international fireworks festival each summer, you’ll have an unmatched vantage point to witness the spectacular fireworks display from above—an experience no grandstand can compare to.

results.description: The space★ Leading onto a patio with sea view and city ,the air-conditioned apartment consists of 2 bedrooms. ★ Offering a balcony with sea views and city this apartment also has a satellite flat-screen TV, a well-equipped kitchen with an oven, a microwave,  a sandwich toaster and a stovetop, as well as 2 bathrooms and slippers. Our car rental service is available.★ Indochina Riverside Mall is 4.3 km from Mường Thanh Luxury Apartment, while Asia Park Danang is 4.5 km away. The nearest airport is Da Nang International Airport, 6 km from the accommodation.★ To make your stay more convenience we provide some extra services below ★ - Motorbike rental: 120,000vnd/day- Dry cleaning: 25,000vnd/kg but the apartment still has a washing machine if you want to use our service.

results.name: Splendid Studio Apt * My Khe Beach
results.description: ⚜️ Welcome to our unique apartment right across My Khe beach. It is meticulously designed with a coastal theme and equipped with high-end interiors. With 45 m2 of elegantly designed living space, our beach apartment promises a truly unforgettable holiday. ⚠️ Important notice: Our accommodation is located right at the central beach, directly opposite the city square where holiday events take place.The space⚜️ Privately owned apartment is located in the building of the 4-star A LA CARTE DA NANG BEACH hotel.  with:- Seaview windows.- Living room.- Dining space. - Cooking stove and cooking utensils.- Disability access.- Child friendly.⚠️ Important note: The building where the apartment is located in the center of Da Nang beach. Therefore, you will have the opportunity to participate in masses music parties, music clubs, and vibrant bars. However, this will be an uncomfortable for light sleeper. You should consider that before booking!Guest access⚜️ You will have your entire apartment with a living area, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen and one bedroom with a closed bathroom. ⚜️ Located in the Alacarte hotel, you will have full access to all amenities and facilities of the hotel(with fees) including:• Beautiful rooftop swimming pool (Opening hours: 6 am - 7 pm).• Gym (Opening hours: 6 am – 7 pm).• Street parking area.• Restaurant (breakfast and meals all day).• Rooftop bar.• Spa & Massage.• Coffee and pastry shop.• Luggage compartment.Other things to note⚜️ BREAKFAST: Breakfast is NOT included in the room rate. The  Fishca restaurant(2nd floor):- Opening time: 06:30-10:00- International buffetDeli Cafe(1st floor):- A la carte menu with selection of tea/coffee and bakery.Top bar(23rd floor)- A la carte menu with fine selection of cocktails and drinks.⚜️ ROOM CLEANING:As the homestay, we don't apply the room cleaning every day as a hotel. If you want to room cleaning, change the bedsheets and towels, please text us 1 day in advance. The fees will be applied.⚜️ TOWELS:- We supply 02 towels/per guest. If possible please wash them and hang them to dry after use.- Please do not use towels for cleaning make-up, or wipe the dirt or water on the floor. Any damaged or stained towel will be charged 150,000 VND/towel.⚜️ PUBLIC AREAS:-  You may access to all amenities in the hotel with additional fees: pool, gym, parking, washer, dryer.- Deli Bakery and Café at 1st floor.- FishCa Restaurant at 2nd floor.- Spice Spa at 23rd floor.- TOP bar at 24th floor.- Washers, dryers available at the basement(B floor).⚜️ FEES:	•	Swimming: 100,000 VND/person/session on weekdays, 120,000 VND/person/session on weekends. 	•	Gym: 100,000 VND/person/session.  No reservation is needed. Please make payment at the spa counter on the 23rd floor.   	•	Parking(basement): 5,000vnd-10,000vnd/time.  	•     Washing machine: 40,000 VND.          •     Dryer: 40,000 VND. 	•     Combo Washer/Dryer: 80,000 VND.    ⚜️ PARKING: motorbikes & bicycles parking at basement of the buiding. The car parking at opposit side of Vo Nguyen Giap street(50m from the A LA CARTE hotel terrace).⚜️ 24/7 mini-mart/grocery store: next to A La Carte hotel.⚜️ TRASH AWAY:Big trashcan outside of the room, at the end of corridor, behind the glass door.⚜️ LATE CHECK-OUT:• Please remind that our checkout time is 11 am.• Late check-out from 1 to 2 hours is charged for 30% of the nightly rate.• Late check out from 3 to 6 hours is charged for 50% of the nightly rate.• Late check out over 6 hours is charged for 100% of the nightly rate.• Late checkout is NOT AVAILABLE ALL THE TIME, please ask us in advance.⚜️ ACCOMMODATION REGISTRATION:  We will declare your stay to the local authorities. On check in time, we will take the photos of the main page of your passport and Vietnam entry stamp. This rule is applies to all members of the group.

results.name: MY KHE apartments; Balcony with sea view
results.description: 100% FREE PICKUP FROM THE AIRPORT FOR ALL STAYS MORE THAN 3 NIGHTS During the time frame (7am- 9pm: free), if the flight is after 9pm, please pay an additional fee of 4 USD to my driverThanks for your interest in this position! If there are no rooms available on the dates you have selected, please visit my profile.I manage multiple Airbnb rentals throughout Da Nang &Hoi An,from 1bedroom to 2-3 bedrooms.I will be delighted to host you and contribute to a wonderful stay in this beautiful city.The spaceAn ideal place for staying and enjoying any beach festivals- Located on the 30 floor of Muong Thanh luxurious building- Wonderful views of the ocean and mountains, city and river night and day- 3 air-con in 2 bedrooms and a large living room with wifi 80 MBps+ smart TV- 2 bathrooms with hot water and basic toiletries- Basic cooking utensils and a washing machine- 3 times more convenient and economical than a hotel room- 150 meters above the ground with the most fantastic view of all.- a minibar at the balcony to make your days and nights so bright- So many windows around that air-conditioners become useless-The apartment is designed in modern style and is fully furnished with luxury, high quality furniture. The house is carefully designed with a vision of giving every guests the most comfortable, relaxing and satisfying stay.-You will be provided with all the essential: towels, body wash, shampoo, tooth brush, tooth paste, razor, etc..-You don’t need to worry about the safety here as this building has a good security. Security guards works 24h, CCTC system is installed, magnetic card is required to use the elevator. Your pets are always welcome to our apartment.-A lot of good local and seafood restaurants and stores close to the building, Breezes and sunshine all day. Minimart on the ground floor.Guest accessYou can access everywhere.You can access every part of the apt.You will be able to access the entire apartment and i'd like you to feel comfortable just like your home.Other things to note- Sometimes, there are minor noises as a few apartments are under decoration.- There is no swimming pool or gym in the building but you can go to nearby hotels with pools and enjoy their pool and bar services for the price of one drink.-We also can arrange cars/ tours to Ba Na hills, Sun World, Hoi An, Hoa Phu Thanh Park,… bus/ flights tickets to go to everywhere in Vietnam.Taxi pick up service from the airport…Drop us a message if you are keen
